headline: Apple drops 5% on memory crunch price hikes
detail: Apple is raising MacBook and iPad prices due to a memory supply squeeze, signaling cost pressure across the semiconductor supply chain. This hits your chip-heavy book hard — AVGO supplies critical components into AI and device ecosystems, so watch it closely today. SMH as your broad chip ETF will feel this too, though you're still green there.

headline: AI winner locked in at triple-digit profit
detail: A headline about locking in big gains on an AI name at record highs suggests some institutional players are taking profits in the AI trade. That kind of rotation out of AI momentum names is a headwind for PLTR and CRWD, both already under pressure in your book.

headline: Q1 GDP gets a boost but not great news
detail: A GDP number that looks good on the surface but carries an asterisk suggests underlying economic softness, which dampens risk appetite. For margin traders in high-multiple tech names like yours, soft macro data reduces the cushion when positions move against you.
